document_title: PeteMart - Enterprise Product Requirements Document (JSON Contract)

project_metadata.target_geography: Old Bangalore Pete Markets (21 Mapped Areas)

personas.name: Priya Sharma
pain_points: Traffic congestion in Pete areas prevents frequent visits
Cannot check product availability before visiting stores
Needs to compare prices across multiple merchants
Wants delivery option for routine purchases
needs: Browse authentic products from specific Pete merchants
Compare prices and product specs online
Order online with home delivery (Mode A)
Negotiate bulk prices via WhatsApp (Mode B)
Get store directions for high-value items (Mode C)

personas.name: Ramesh Gupta
personas.occupation: Owner of silk saree showroom in Chickpet (3rd generation)
pain_points: Limited digital presence despite 60+ year old business
Fear of hidden e-commerce commissions eating margins
Wants to drive physical footfall for high-value items
Needs simple tools, not complex ERP systems
needs: Simple digital storefront with zero-risk discovery
WhatsApp-based negotiation for high-value items
Google Maps directions for store visits
Affordable subscription with no hidden fees
Assisted catalog upload service

personas.name: Vinay Kumar
pain_points: Navigating narrow, crowded Pete lanes is difficult
Multi-store pickups are time-consuming without route optimization
needs: Optimized multi-stop pickup route in courier app
Clear delivery zone assignment and instructions
Real-time order status tracking
Reliable weekly payout structure

personas.name: Ananya Rao
pain_points: Manual merchant verification is slow and error-prone
Revenue streams across modes are difficult to track
No unified dashboard for all platform metrics
needs: Real-time merchant, order, and revenue dashboards
Subscription lifecycle management automation
Automated payout reconciliation system
Content moderation tools for merchant listings

personas.name: Deepa Patel
personas.occupation: Small retail shop owner (provisions store in Jayanagar)
pain_points: No digital catalog of wholesale merchant inventory
Phone tag for price negotiation is inefficient
Delivery logistics for bulk orders are unclear
needs: View wholesale price lists and MOQ information
Negotiate bulk pricing via WhatsApp
Order bulk quantities with delivery to shop
Repeat order history for regular supplies

steps.system_response: Loads landing page with Pete Tapestry carousel, featured markets, search bar

steps.action: Selects a Pete market or searches for product
steps.system_response: Displays filtered list of merchants in that market with specialization badges

steps.action: Browses product catalog of a selected merchant
steps.system_response: Shows product cards with name, price, images, Mode badges (A/B/C), MOQ info

steps.action: Filters by interaction mode or category
steps.system_response: Re-renders product grid showing only matching mode-enabled products
Shows full product description, available modes, merchant info, rating, delivery eligibility

steps.action: Clicks 'Add to Cart' on a Mode A product
steps.system_response: Item added to cart; cart icon badge updates; option to continue shopping or view cart

steps.action: Adds products from the same or different Pete merchants
steps.system_response: Cart shows itemized list with merchant names, prices, delivery fee estimates per merchant
Validates cart items, calculates delivery fee using zone-based formula, applies consolidation surcharge
Verifies address within delivery zone, shows delivery slot options

steps.action: Selects B2C or B2B mode based on quantity
steps.system_response: Adjusts pricing to retail (4% commission) or wholesale (1.5% commission, capped at Rs 500)
Secure payment gateway processes UPI/Card/NetBanking; 2% PG fee applied
Order confirmed; notification sent to customer + merchant; order visible in My Orders

steps.action: Routes order to merchant dashboard + courier dispatch
steps.system_response: Merchant sees order; courier assigned; pickup scheduled within SLA

steps.action: Views a Mode B product and clicks 'Enquire on WhatsApp'
steps.system_response: Generates a deep-link URL with pre-filled product info (name, SKU, asking price, merchant name)
WhatsApp opens with chat directed to merchant's registered WhatsApp Business number; pre-populated message template
(Off-platform) Merchant and customer negotiate

steps.action: Agreement reached; instructs customer to proceed or arranges delivery
steps.system_response: Merchant may create a manual order in dashboard or request customer to use Mode A
Logs the enquiry event for merchant analytics (not conversation content)

steps.action: Views a Mode C product and clicks 'Visit Store' or 'Get Directions'
steps.system_response: Displays store facade gallery, virtual window display, and prominent 'Open in Google Maps' button
Deep link opens Google Maps app with merchant's exact geolocation pinned; travel time shown

steps.action: Visits physical store, inspects product, completes purchase offline
steps.system_response: (Off-platform) Customer buys directly at the store
Push notification/email prompts customer to rate their experience
Records the Mode C engagement as a visit lead for merchant analytics

steps.action: Views cart with items from multiple Pete merchants
steps.system_response: Calculates: Delivery Fee = Max(Zone Base Rate among shops) + (Rs 25 x (N-1)) + Weight Surcharges

steps.action: Reviews consolidated order summary with delivery fee breakdown
steps.system_response: Shows merchant-wise items, sub-totals, delivery fee split, total payable
Validates and applies discount; recalculates total
Initializes Razorpay payment widget with total amount + 2% PG fee
Confirms payment, triggers order to all relevant merchants, initiates courier dispatch
Courier app shows optimized route: Merchant A - Merchant B - Micro-Hub - Customer

steps.action: Picks up items sequentially, delivers to Micro-Hub for consolidation
steps.system_response: Micro-Hub consolidates, single bag dispatched for final delivery
Displays list of all past and active orders with status badges (Confirmed, Picked Up, In Transit, Delivered)
Shows detailed order status: payment confirmed, merchant preparing, courier assigned, pickup completed, at Micro-Hub, out for delivery
Real-time courier location marker on map with ETA updates (mobile only)

steps.action: Updates order status via Courier App
steps.system_response: Status changes propagate to customer and merchant in real-time; push notifications sent
Delivered status; prompt to rate experience and optionally tip courier

steps.action: Visits petemart.com/sell or downloads Merchant App
steps.system_response: Onboarding wizard starts: phone number verification via OTP

steps.action: Fills business details (store name, address, category, market area)
steps.system_response: Validates address, assigns geo-coordinates via Google Maps API
Applies pricing (Rs 499/Rs 999/Rs 2,499 per month or annual equivalent)

steps.action: Chooses interaction modes (Mode A/B/C - select at least one)
steps.system_response: Validates prerequisites: Mode A requires Razorpay + catalog; Mode B requires WhatsApp Business; Mode C requires Maps pin + address

steps.action: Uploads initial product catalog (manual or done-for-you service at Rs 10/product)
steps.system_response: Processes images, assigns default mode badges, sets inventory to draft
Store goes live; merchant receives QR code, store URL (petemart.in/shop-name), and welcome kit

web_application.name: Landing Page Discovery
web_application.description: Browse Pete Tapestry carousel, featured markets, top merchants

web_application.name: Product Search & Filter
web_application.description: Full-text search with faceted filters (market, category, mode, price range, rating)

web_application.name: Mode A Direct Checkout
web_application.description: End-to-end cart, multi-store consolidation, Razorpay payment, order confirmation

web_application.name: Mode B WhatsApp Enquiry
web_application.description: Click-to-WhatsApp deep-link generation, pre-filled message template

web_application.name: Mode C Store Visit
web_application.description: Store facade gallery, virtual window, Google Maps directions deep-link

web_application.name: Merchant Microsite
web_application.description: Public-facing branded store page with full catalog, QR code, contact info

web_application.name: Order History & Tracking
web_application.description: View past orders, live tracking (web map), repeat order

web_application.name: Merchant Dashboard
web_application.description: Catalog management, order management, analytics, subscription settings

web_application.name: Admin Console
web_application.description: Merchant approvals, revenue reports, user management, dispute resolution

mobile_application.name: Mobile Landing & Browse
mobile_application.description: Optimized mobile-first layout with Pete Tapestry, market grid

mobile_application.name: Scan QR Code Store Access
mobile_application.description: Camera-based QR scanner opens merchant microsite instantly

mobile_application.name: Mobile Checkout (Mode A)
mobile_application.description: Simplified cart, UPI/BHIM integration, biometric payment confirmation

mobile_application.name: WhatsApp Deep Link (Mode B)
mobile_application.description: One-tap WhatsApp redirect with product context

mobile_application.name: GPS Navigation (Mode C)
mobile_application.description: Navigate button opens Google Maps with turn-by-turn directions

mobile_application.name: Live Delivery Tracking
mobile_application.description: Real-time courier GPS tracking with push notification updates

mobile_application.name: Push Notifications
mobile_application.description: Order confirmed, out for delivery, delivered, feedback prompts

mobile_application.name: Courier Partner App
mobile_application.description: Multi-stop pickup route, status updates, earnings summary

mobile_application.name: Merchant Mobile Dashboard
mobile_application.description: Quick order alerts, inventory updates, WhatsApp notification mirroring

ui_ux.title: Landing Page with Pete Tapestry
ui_ux.description: Interactive carousel/tabbed interface showcasing 21 Pete markets with history, specialization, and featured merchants. Includes SEO meta-tags.

operational.description: Cloud hosting and CDN bandwidth for landing page assets

deployment.description: Frontend development and initial deployment

acceptance_criteria: All 21 Pete markets displayed with correct historical summaries
Interactive carousel works on mobile and desktop
SEO meta-tags render correctly for each Pete market page
Page load time under 2 seconds on 4G

ui_ux.title: Product Catalog & Search
ui_ux.description: Full-text search across 392+ merchants with facet filters (market, category, mode, price, rating). Autocomplete and spell-correction.

operational.description: Search index hosting and query processing

deployment.description: Search UI development and integration

acceptance_criteria: Full-text search returns results within 500ms
Facet filters narrow results correctly
Autocomplete suggests merchant and product names
Spell-correction handles common typos

ui_ux.title: Mode A Product Card & In-App Cart
ui_ux.description: Product cards with 'Add to Cart' CTA; cart supports multi-merchant items; quantity toggles for B2C/B2B pricing.

operational.description: Cart state management and API calls

deployment.description: Cart UI component development

acceptance_criteria: Add to Cart updates badge count in real-time
Cart supports items from up to 5 different merchants
B2C/B2B quantity toggle adjusts per-unit pricing
Cart persists across sessions for logged-in users

ui_ux.title: Mode B WhatsApp Enquiry Button
ui_ux.description: 'Enquire on WhatsApp' CTA on product cards; generates deep-link with pre-filled product + merchant info.

operational.description: WhatsApp Business API messaging volume

deployment.description: WhatsApp deep-link UI and tracking implementation

acceptance_criteria: Deep-link opens WhatsApp with pre-populated message
Message contains product name, SKU, and merchant name
Click-through event is logged for merchant analytics
Works on both web and mobile browsers

ui_ux.title: Mode C Visit Store Interface
ui_ux.description: Store facade gallery, virtual window display, 'Get Directions' button with Google Maps deep-link.

operational.description: Google Maps embeds and geocoding API calls

deployment.description: Store facade gallery and Maps integration UI

acceptance_criteria: Store facade gallery renders high-res images
Virtual window display cycles through latest products
Get Directions opens Google Maps with correct pin
Store operating hours displayed prominently

ui_ux.title: Multi-Store Checkout Flow
ui_ux.description: Unified checkout showing merchant-wise items; delivery fee consolidation formula; Razorpay payment widget.

operational.description: Checkout flow processing and payment integration

deployment.description: Multi-store checkout UI development

acceptance_criteria: Delivery fee formula correctly applied and displayed
Razorpay payment widget loads within 3 seconds
Payment success/failure handled gracefully
Order confirmation shows all merchant-wise items

ui_ux.title: Order Tracking Dashboard
ui_ux.description: My Orders page with status timeline, live courier GPS tracking (mobile), delivery ETA.

operational.description: Real-time tracking data processing and WebSocket connections

deployment.description: Order tracking UI with live map integration

acceptance_criteria: Order status timeline updates in real-time
Live GPS tracking works on mobile apps
Push notification sent at each status change
Order history searchable by date, merchant, status

ui_ux.title: Merchant Store Microsite
ui_ux.description: Public branded page at petemart.in/shop-name with full catalog, store info, QR code download, WhatsApp CTA, directions.

operational.description: Microsite hosting and CDN delivery

deployment.description: Microsite template and dynamic routing development

acceptance_criteria: URL pattern petemart.in/shop-name resolves correctly
QR code downloads as print-ready PNG
Full product catalog renders with mode badges
Google indexation meta-tags present on every page

ui_ux.title: Mobile App (iOS) - Core Screens
ui_ux.description: Native iOS app: landing, browse, cart, checkout, order tracking, QR scanner, notifications.

operational.description: Apple Developer Program annual fee and push notification service

deployment.description: Apple Developer Program enrollment ($99/yr)

acceptance_criteria: App passes Apple App Store review guidelines
All core workflows functional on iOS 16+
Push notifications delivered reliably
QR scanner opens store microsite in < 2 seconds

ui_ux.title: Mobile App (Android) - Core Screens
ui_ux.description: Native Android app (same feature parity as iOS): browse, cart, checkout, GPS tracking, QR scanner.

operational.description: Google Play Console and Firebase Cloud Messaging

deployment.description: Google Play Developer registration ($25 one-time)

acceptance_criteria: App passes Google Play Store review
All core workflows functional on Android 10+ (API 29+)
Live GPS tracking works with background location permission
Feature parity maintained with iOS version

ui_ux.title: Merchant Onboarding Dashboard
ui_ux.description: Self-service onboarding wizard: OTP verification, business details, plan selection, mode selection, catalog upload.

operational.description: Field executive assistance for in-person merchant onboarding

deployment.description: First 50 stores concierge onboarding visits

acceptance_criteria: OTP verification completes in under 10 seconds
Plan selection shows pricing and feature comparison
Mode selection validates prerequisites before activation
Catalog upload supports bulk CSV and manual entry

ui_ux.title: Admin/Operator Dashboard
ui_ux.description: Merchant approval workflows, revenue analytics, subscription lifecycle, dispute management, user management.

operational.description: Admin dashboard cloud infrastructure and analytics compute

deployment.description: Admin dashboard full-stack development

acceptance_criteria: Merchant approval queue with one-click approve/reject
Revenue dashboard shows real-time MRR and commission breakdown
Subscription lifecycle shows active/expired/suspended states
Export reports to CSV/PDF with date range filter

ui_ux.title: Multi-Language / i18n Support
ui_ux.description: Kannada, Hindi, English language toggle. UI string externalization, RTL support preparation, locale-aware date/currency formatting, language preference persistence.

operational.description: Translation management system, locale file hosting, language QA tools

deployment.description: UI string externalization, TMS setup, Kannada/Hindi translation, RTL support preparation

acceptance_criteria: Language toggle switches UI between Kannada, Hindi, and English instantly
All user-facing strings externalized to locale files with zero hardcoded text
Date and currency formatting respects selected locale
Language preference persists across sessions and devices

ui_ux.title: Merchant Sales & Analytics Dashboard
ui_ux.description: Views, clicks, enquiries, orders, revenue charts. Daily/weekly/monthly trends. Mode-wise breakdown (A/B/C). Top selling products. Customer demographics. Export to PDF/CSV.

operational.description: Dashboard hosting and analytics compute

deployment.description: Merchant analytics dashboard development

acceptance_criteria: Dashboard shows views, clicks, enquiries, orders, and revenue in real-time
Trend charts support daily/weekly/monthly granularity
Mode-wise breakdown correctly separates A/B/C performance
Export to PDF/CSV completes within 10 seconds for monthly data

api.title: Product Catalog API
api.description: CRUD endpoints for product listings, inventory, pricing tiers (retail/wholesale), mode badges.

operational.description: API endpoint hosting and database query processing

deployment.description: RESTful API development for product catalog

acceptance_criteria: All CRUD operations return correct HTTP status codes
Pagination supports 50 items per page default
Pricing tiers correctly return retail vs wholesale pricing
Mode badges filterable via query parameter

api.title: Order Management API
api.description: Create, read, update order status. Multi-store order splitting. Order history and repeat order endpoints.

operational.description: Order processing compute and database transactions

deployment.description: Order management API development

acceptance_criteria: Order creation accepts multi-merchant payloads
Status transitions follow defined state machine
Order history returns paginated results sorted by date descending
Repeat order endpoint duplicates last order items

api.title: Payment Gateway Integration API
api.description: Razorpay integration: create orders, verify payments, refunds, webhook handling for payment status.

operational.description: Razorpay transaction fees (2% pass-through) and API calls

deployment.description: Razorpay integration, KYC, webhook setup

acceptance_criteria: Razorpay order creation returns payment link within 2 seconds
Webhook correctly updates order payment status
Refund API processes full and partial refunds
Payment retry logic handles failed transactions gracefully

api.title: WhatsApp Deep-Linking API
api.description: Generate WhatsApp deep-link URLs with product context; track click-through events for merchant analytics.

operational.description: WhatsApp Business API monthly costs

deployment.description: Deep-link generation and click tracking API

acceptance_criteria: Deep-link URL correctly encodes product and merchant identifiers
Click events are logged with timestamp and product ID
Merchant analytics dashboard reflects click-through data
URL works on both WhatsApp and WhatsApp Business apps

api.title: Google Maps Integration API
api.description: Geocoding addresses on merchant onboarding; directions URL generation; distance matrix for delivery zone calculation.

operational.description: Google Maps API monthly usage (geocoding, distance matrix, maps)

deployment.description: Google Maps API integration and key management

acceptance_criteria: Geocoding resolves 95%+ of Pete market addresses correctly
Directions URL opens Google Maps app with pre-set destination
Distance matrix returns accurate zone classification
API keys are restricted by HTTP referrer and platform

api.title: User Authentication & Profile API
api.description: OTP-based login (phone number), JWT session management, user profile CRUD, address management.

operational.description: SMS OTP delivery costs via MSG91/Twilio

deployment.description: Auth API and Supabase Auth configuration

acceptance_criteria: OTP delivery in under 5 seconds
JWT tokens expire after configurable TTL (default 24h)
Profile CRUD supports multiple saved addresses
Role-based access control (customer/merchant/courier/admin)

api.title: Delivery Tracking API
api.description: Courier GPS location ingestion, ETA calculation, status update webhooks, delivery proof (photo) upload.

operational.description: GPS location ingestion and WebSocket connections

deployment.description: Real-time tracking API and WebSocket infrastructure

acceptance_criteria: GPS location updates at 30-second intervals
ETA recalculates with each location update
Delivery proof photo upload under 5MB with compression
Status webhooks propagate to customer within 2 seconds

api.title: Merchant Management API
api.description: Merchant profile CRUD, subscription tier management, mode activation/deactivation, catalog approval workflow.

operational.description: Merchant management API hosting and processing

deployment.description: Merchant management REST API development

acceptance_criteria: Merchant status transitions follow defined workflow (draft/pending/active/suspended)
Mode activation validates prerequisites per business_revenue_model.json rules
Subscription tier changes are logged with timestamp
Catalog items require admin approval before going live

api.title: Notification & SMS API
api.description: Transactional SMS (order confirmation, delivery updates), push notification service for mobile, email fallback.

operational.description: Transactional SMS, push notification infrastructure, email API

deployment.description: Multi-channel notification service development

acceptance_criteria: SMS delivery confirmed within 5 seconds of trigger
Push notifications delivered to 99%+ of active devices
Email fallback template renders correctly on all clients
Opt-out/unsubscribe mechanism included per TRAI guidelines

api.title: Analytics & Reporting API
api.description: Aggregated sales data per merchant, per market, per mode. Revenue reports, customer acquisition metrics.

operational.description: Analytics data pipeline compute and storage

deployment.description: Analytics API and data aggregation development

acceptance_criteria: Sales aggregation queries return results in under 5 seconds
Data exports available in JSON and CSV formats
Dashboard refresh interval configurable (real-time/hourly/daily)
Merchant-facing revenue data isolated to own store only

api.title: Mode Switching After Onboarding API
api.description: Enable/disable modes post-onboarding, validate prerequisites before activation, update store availability, notify customers of mode changes.

operational.description: Mode switching API compute and validation processing

deployment.description: Mode switching API development with prerequisite validation

acceptance_criteria: Mode activation validates prerequisite requirements per business rules
Mode deactivation gracefully handles active orders in that mode
Storefront reflects mode changes within 60 seconds
Customers subscribed to merchant notifications are informed of mode changes

backend_data.title: Database Schema & Data Models
backend_data.description: PostgreSQL/Supabase schema: merchants, products, orders, users, subscriptions, payouts, delivery zones. Indexed for high-concurrency.

operational.description: Database hosting, storage, and backup costs

deployment.description: Database schema design, migration scripts, initial seed data

acceptance_criteria: All tables have appropriate indexes on foreign keys and query columns
Row Level Security (RLS) policies implemented for multi-tenant isolation
Migration scripts have rollback capability
Schema supports 5000+ merchants with sub-second query times

backend_data.title: Order Processing Engine
backend_data.description: Order lifecycle engine: payment verification, merchant notification, courier dispatch, status tracking, delivery confirmation.

operational.description: Order processing compute and state machine execution

deployment.description: Order state machine and event handling development

acceptance_criteria: Order state transitions follow defined state machine (pending/confirmed/preparing/dispatched/delivered)
Failed payment retries up to 3 times before cancellation
Order timeout for unpaid orders after 30 minutes
Concurrent order processing supports 100+ orders/minute

backend_data.title: Multi-Store Consolidation Engine
backend_data.description: Logic to group cart items by merchant, calculate per-merchant delivery fees, apply consolidation formula, generate optimized pickup routes.

operational.description: Route optimization compute and consolidation logic processing

deployment.description: Consolidation engine algorithm and route optimization development

acceptance_criteria: Delivery fee correctly calculated per consolidation rules
Pickup route optimization minimizes total distance for multi-stop orders
Micro-Hub routing logic correctly identifies consolidation point
Handles up to 5 merchants per consolidated order

backend_data.title: Subscription & Billing Engine
backend_data.description: Manage plan lifecycle: signup, monthly/annual billing, plan upgrades/downgrades, failed payment retry, invoice generation.

operational.description: Billing engine compute and invoice generation

deployment.description: Subscription billing logic and Razorpay subscription integration

acceptance_criteria: Plan upgrade/downgrade prorates billing correctly
Failed payment retries 3 times with 24-hour intervals
Invoice PDF generated and emailed on successful payment
Annual plan correctly applies 2 months free discount

backend_data.title: Payment Reconciliation & Payouts
backend_data.description: Track platform earnings (commission, subscription, VAS), merchant payouts (Mode A sales minus commission), courier payouts (85% of delivery fee). Weekly settlement.

operational.description: Reconciliation batch processing compute

deployment.description: Payout reconciliation engine development

acceptance_criteria: Reconciliation matches Razorpay settlement reports within 0.1% tolerance
Merchant payout calculation correctly deducts commission and PG fees
Courier payout correctly allocates 85% of delivery fee
Weekly settlement cycle completes within 2 hours

backend_data.title: Notification Engine
backend_data.description: Template-driven notification system: SMS (Twilio/MSG91), push (Firebase/APNs), email (SendGrid). Delivery SLA monitoring.

operational.description: Multi-channel notification delivery costs

deployment.description: Notification engine template system and channel integration

acceptance_criteria: Notification templates are configurable via admin dashboard
Delivery SLA of 30 seconds for SMS, 10 seconds for push
Failed delivery retries up to 3 times across channels
Opt-out preferences respected across all channels

backend_data.title: Delivery/Logistics Engine
backend_data.description: Assign couriers to orders based on zone, load balancing; calculate delivery fees using zone + weight + consolidation formula; track courier earnings.

operational.description: Courier assignment algorithm and real-time dispatch compute

deployment.description: Logistics engine with zone management and courier assignment

acceptance_criteria: Courier assigned within 60 seconds of order confirmation
Delivery zones correctly map to 3 slabs (0-3km, 3-7km, 7+km)
Load balancing prevents single courier overload
Courier earnings dashboard shows per-delivery breakdown

backend_data.title: Analytics Data Pipeline
backend_data.description: Event streaming pipeline for user actions, order events, clicks; aggregate into merchant-facing and admin-facing dashboards.

operational.description: Event streaming infrastructure and data warehouse compute

deployment.description: Event pipeline setup and dashboard integration

acceptance_criteria: Event ingestion handles 1000+ events per minute
Dashboard data refreshes within 5 minutes of event occurrence
Merchant data isolation ensures cross-merchant data leaks are impossible
Retention policy: raw events 30 days, aggregated 12 months

backend_data.title: Search & Discovery Engine
backend_data.description: Full-text search with typo-tolerance, faceted filters, relevance scoring. Uses PostgreSQL FTS or Algolia.

operational.description: Search index hosting (Algolia/PostgreSQL FTS) and query credits

deployment.description: Search index configuration and ranking algorithm tuning

acceptance_criteria: Search results returned within 300ms at P95
Typo-tolerance handles 2-character errors in product names
Facet filters combine correctly with full-text search
Relevance scoring prioritizes exact matches over partial

backend_data.title: Caching & Performance Layer
backend_data.description: Redis caching for product catalogs, session data, frequently accessed queries. CDN for static assets and product images.

operational.description: Redis instance and CDN bandwidth costs

deployment.description: Redis configuration, CDN setup, caching strategy implementation

acceptance_criteria: Product catalog cache TTL of 5 minutes with invalidation on updates
CDN cache hit rate above 80% for static assets
Session data stored in Redis with 24-hour TTL
Cache stampede protection implemented for popular queries

backend_data.title: Merchant Catalog Management (Post-Onboarding)
backend_data.description: Ongoing CRUD for products, bulk CSV/Excel upload, inventory quantity toggle, stock-out flagging, category management, product image management.

operational.description: Catalog digitization assistance and image processing

deployment.description: Catalog management engine with bulk upload and image handling

acceptance_criteria: CSV/Excel upload processes 1000+ products within 2 minutes
Inventory quantity toggle updates storefront in real-time
Stock-out flag removes product from search results automatically
Image management supports bulk upload with auto-resizing and compression

backend_data.title: Product Review & Rating System
backend_data.description: Customer reviews with photo/video upload, star ratings (1-5), verified purchase badge, merchant response, moderation queue for admin.

operational.description: Review storage, image/video hosting, moderation tools

deployment.description: Review system with moderation queue and media handling

acceptance_criteria: Only verified purchasers can submit reviews with Verified Purchase badge
Photo/video upload supports up to 5 images and 1 video (30s max)
Admin moderation queue allows approve/reject/flag actions
Merchant can respond to reviews within 7 days of posting

backend_data.title: Dispute Resolution & Support Ticketing System
backend_data.description: Ticket creation (customer/merchant), status tracking, escalation matrix, refund processing workflow, admin arbitration dashboard.

operational.description: Admin staff time for dispute resolution and arbitration

deployment.description: Ticketing system with escalation matrix and refund workflow

acceptance_criteria: Ticket creation available from order page with auto-populated context
Status tracking shows: Open, Under Review, Escalated, Resolved, Closed
Escalation matrix routes unresolved tickets to senior admin after 48h
Refund processing workflow integrates with Razorpay refund API

backend_data.title: Offline-First Mobile Capability
backend_data.description: Local caching of product catalogs and merchant data, offline order queuing with sync on connectivity restore, conflict resolution for stale data.

operational.description: Offline data sync infrastructure and conflict resolution compute

deployment.description: Offline-first architecture with local storage and sync engine

acceptance_criteria: Product catalog loads from local cache when network is unavailable
Orders placed offline are queued and synced when connectivity restores
Conflict resolution uses last-write-wins with user notification on conflict
Cache invalidation triggers on catalog update when back online

backend_data.title: GST/TCS Compliance & Auto-Invoicing
backend_data.description: Automatic GST invoice generation per order, TCS collection under section 52 of CGST Act, monthly GSTR-1/GSTR-3B return data export, HSN/SAC code mapping.

operational.description: CA retainer for GST filing review and compliance advisory

deployment.description: GST invoice template, TCS logic, GSTR export module

acceptance_criteria: GST invoice generated automatically for every Mode A order
TCS at 0.5% (or applicable rate) collected and shown on invoice
GSTR-1/GSTR-3B data export available in format compatible with GST portal
HSN/SAC code mapping maintained with admin override capability

backend_data.title: MOQ & Bulk Order Enforcement
backend_data.description: Minimum order quantity validation per product, B2B minimum cart value rules, tiered pricing by quantity slabs, automated quote generation for bulk orders.

operational.description: MOQ validation and tiered pricing compute

deployment.description: MOQ engine, tiered pricing rules, bulk quote generator

acceptance_criteria: Cart blocks checkout if product MOQ not met with clear error message
B2B mode minimum cart value configured per merchant (default Rs 500)
Tiered pricing automatically adjusts unit price based on quantity
Bulk quote request generates PDF and sends to customer email

backend_data.title: Customer Data Platform (CDP) & Behavioral Analytics
backend_data.description: Unified customer profile across all touchpoints (web, mobile, WhatsApp), event tracking (page views, searches, cart adds, orders), funnel analysis, cohort retention analysis, predictive churn scoring.

operational.description: CDP infrastructure, event processing, ML model hosting

deployment.description: CDP implementation, event schema design, ML model development

acceptance_criteria: Customer profile unified across web, mobile, and WhatsApp touchpoints
Event ingestion handles 5000+ events per minute
Funnel analysis shows conversion rates at each step (browse>cart>checkout>order)
Predictive churn scoring identifies at-risk customers with 80%+ accuracy

commerce_monetization.title: Subscription Plan Management
commerce_monetization.description: Admin configurable plans (Starter Rs 499/mo, Growth Rs 999/mo, Premium Rs 2,499/mo); annual discount (2 months free); plan feature gating.

operational.description: Subscription management compute and feature gating logic

deployment.description: Plan configuration, pricing rules, and billing integration

acceptance_criteria: Admin can create/update plans with configurable pricing and features
Feature gating correctly restricts access based on plan tier

performance_scale.title: Performance Baseline at 50% Commercial E-Commerce Load
performance_scale.description: Target: LCP <2.5s, INP <200ms, CLS <0.1, API response <300ms P95. Baseline: 500 concurrent users, 50 req/s peak. Architecture must be horizontally scalable to 2x (100%) without re-architecture.

operational.description: Performance monitoring dashboard and synthetic testing agents

deployment.description: Performance baseline measurement, k6 test scripts, dashboard setup

acceptance_criteria: LCP <= 2.5s on 4G throttled connection for 90th percentile users
INP <= 200ms for all user interactions
CLS <= 0.1 on all page loads
API P95 response time <= 300ms for all customer-facing endpoints
Architecture scales to 2x load without re-architecture

performance_scale.title: Horizontal Scalability Architecture

deployment.description: Stateless architecture refactoring, auto-scaling configuration
